summary: Implemented analogy-based dialogue learning layer for Stage 1 lessons in Python Quest MVP

changes_summary.content_files: Added analogyDialogue, childTakeaway, analogyQuest, and glitchTrap.analogy to all 10 Stage 1 lessons in both RU and EN
changes_summary.api_route: Updated individual lesson API route to merge new fields from localized content
changes_summary.i18n: Added translation keys for analogyTitle, childTakeawayTitle, analogyQuestTitle in both languages
changes_summary.ui_components: Updated LessonPage to render analogyDialogue block, childTakeaway, and analogyQuest; updated GlitchTrap to display analogy field
changes_summary.tests: Added 8 new tests to verify presence of analogyDialogue, childTakeaway, analogyQuest, and glitchTrap.analogy in all lessons for both languages

test_results.lint: Passed with 1 pre-existing warning (unrelated to changes)
